title: vitis vulpina var. praecox
intro: Vitis vulpina var. praecox, also known as the Early Grapevine or Frost Grape, is a deciduous woody vine native to eastern North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vitis vulpina var. praecox include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and effective treatment option.
